ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacy Stecher for Kevin Joseph Quattrin, Petitioner/Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Stecher reported that real property is expected to sell in the coming months. Occupants residing in the property agreed to vacate by today (12/31/2024). After discussing appropriate timelines, the court continued the hearing on status of close of estate to June 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
